message:
Command `# Still running (20 min in, 99% CPU). Memory still 9% (734MB).
# The ODB hasn't been fully loaded yet (still in lib/lef loading phase).
# 
# This is the same slow loading we saw before. The 206MB ODB takes a long time to load
# because all the libs and LEFs must be loaded first.
# 
# Let's check memory expansion (to detect when ODB loads):
sleep 1800
ps -p $(cat /tmp/antenna_check.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "DONE"
cat /proc/$(cat /tmp/antenna_check.pid)/status 2>/dev/null | grep "VmRSS" || echo "ended"
tail -5 /tmp/antenna_check.log
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/reports/ 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# Still running (20 min in, 99% CPU). Memory still 9% (734MB).
# The ODB hasn't been fully loaded yet (still in lib/lef loading phase).
# 
# This is the same slow loading we saw before. The 206MB ODB takes a long time to load
# because all the libs and LEFs must be loaded first.
# 
# Let's check memory expansion (to detect when ODB loads):
sleep 1800
ps -p $(cat /tmp/antenna_check.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "DONE"
cat /proc/$(cat /tmp/antenna_check.pid)/status 2>/dev/null | grep "VmRSS" || echo "ended"
tail -5 /tmp/antenna_check.log
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/reports/ 2>/dev/null
